note: Ancestry mechanics only; descriptions are our own paraphrase.

ancestries.name: Human
ancestries.mech: Gain an extra heroic-path talent at creation (another talent in your path, or the first talent of a second path).

ancestries.name: Singer
ancestries.mech: Gain the Change Form key talent plus one talent granting starting forms. Forms (e.g. warform, workform, nimbleform, mateform, dullform) swap attribute/feature packages.
